name: Spicy Lentils with Peppers & Tomatoes
recipeIngredient: Brown or green lentils (3/4 lb, washed and picked over, approximately 2 cups)
Garlic (2 cloves, minced or put through a garlic press)
Hot chili peppers (2, seeded and finely chopped)
Fresh tomatoes (1 1/2 lb, seeded and finely chopped OR 1 1/2 lb canned tomatoes, drained juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the lentils, water, and bay leaf in a large heavy-bottomed saucepan. Bring to a boil.
2. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer for 30 to 40 minutes until the lentils are tender. Add salt to taste.
3. Drain and retain some of the cooking liquid.
4. Heat olive oil in a large heavy-bottomed skillet or casserole. Add onion and garlic. Sauté over medium-low heat until the onion is tender and beginning to color.
5. Add green pepper and chili peppers, and sauté another 5-10 minutes until the peppers are tender. Add tomatoes and drained lentils. If the mixture seems dry, add a little bit of cooking liquid from the lentils.
6. Simmer over medium-low heat for 15 minutes. Season with more salt and pepper, stir in cilantro and lemon juice if desired, and serve, or allow to cool and serve chilled.
This dish will keep for 3-5 days in the refrigerator. Serves 6-8.
